items.name_en: Mini 👄L New Geometric Bag, lightweight, versatile styling. The new solid Puzzle Lo Pink is a must-have! The highlight is this season's satin calfskin, which is smoother, glossier, and holds its shape better. The strap, metal buckle, and lining are all color-coordinated, offering a novel yet high-end look. The wide strap design is a pleasant surprise, and the back zip pocket has been replaced by a small pocket. The new ceiling item! Just buy it. Model: L10173B, Size: 18*7.5*12cm

items.name_en: L⊚℮w℮🌟New Version🆕 Small Soft Suede Puzzle Edge Handbag
items.name_cn:
L⊚℮w℮🌟New Version🆕 Small Soft Suede Puzzle Edge Handbag
L 🆕 debut handbag*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the unique geometric lines of Puzzle*This small version is made of soft suede and features overlapping edges. The small Puzzle can hold a large wallet, all phone sizes, and sunglasses; can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody*Carried as a handbag or with the top handle*Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap*One internal slip pocket and one external rear zip pocket*Zip closure with leather pull tab*Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
size:24*10.5*16CM
Model:062324

items.name_en: Niki_22cm Elephant Grain Suede
items.name_cn:
Niki_22cm Elephant Grain Suede
Unisex salt-style college aesthetic shoulder and crossbody bag
Lightweight and soft lambskin, overall low-key luxury and versatile. The commuter shape works for both casual and salt styles. Black with black logo, the design is more minimalist. Shoulder strap is not detachable, easy to style.
If you like it, you can definitely get it. A timeless style.
Model: 633151 Elephant Grain
Size: 22×16.5×12cm

items.name_en: In Stock 22K New Backpack 🖤 AS3662 Patent Leather. Happiness level maxed out 😍 This is a hot item 🔥 The degree of being loved is obvious to all! Waiting for it with bated breath~ Finally got it~ This is simply a blessing for large bag lovers. The space inside is huge, and practicality is super strong 👍 The real thing is truly huge, huge, huge, huge, beautiful. Patent leather has its own luster, not as delicate as sheepskin, but lighter than grained cowhide. Predicted it will be the bag everyone loves this year 👋 It's really , sweet and cool yet retro, this backpack is the center of attention, the patent leather wind of this year, no one can escape 🫶🫶 Simply too addictive! Really explosively good!! (size: 31.5*31*9cm)

Overall curved shape, wide shoulder strap, two black badges on each side, quite a vintage feel. The opening design is more convenient than a zipper. No decoration on the back, very simple. items.name_en: Top-tier replica M45943 Steel Small Flower ✨ M45960 Steel Brown Trim. Every detail of this Petite Malle handbag draws from Louis Vuitton's trunk-making heritage: the bag's silhouette, iconic Monogram canvas, metal lock and hardware – plus the classic printed lambskin lining. Finished with smooth calfskin trim, this exquisite and charming "mini trunk" is a companion from day to night. Can be worn as a clutch or crossbody with an adjustable strap. Detailed Features 20 x 12.5 x 6 cm (Length x Height x Width)

Every detail of this Petite Malle handbag draws from Louis Vuitton's trunk-making heritage: the bag's silhouette, iconic Monogram canvas, metal lock and hardware – plus the classic printed calfskin lining. Finished with smooth calfskin trim, this exquisite and charming "mini trunk" is a companion from day to night. Can be carried as a clutch or worn crossbody with an adjustable strap.
